title: T-034 — Reschedule WO Modal (reschedule_wo_modal)
prompt:
# T-034 — Reschedule WO Modal

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-07-01 §3.6 [Reschedule WO]
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:214-287 (`reschedule_wo_modal`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:1000-1011
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Dialog (variant of Override) for [Reschedule WO] action — preserves WO id, prefills current line/shift; uses fa_line_compatibility for line eligibility + acknowledgement checkbox for ineligible lines (audit-logged).

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/scheduler/RescheduleWOModal.tsx` (shadcn Dialog max-w-3xl).
2. Loads eligibleLineIds from fa_line_compatibility join in Server Component prop.
3. zod superRefine: `isEligible || ackIneligible` (V-SCHED-03 cross-field).
4. Server Action `rescheduleWOAction` (separate from override): cascade dependency check (V-SCHED-04 no overlap), audit log ack_override_reason, outbox emit scheduler.wo.rescheduled.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/RescheduleWOModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/reschedule-action.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/RescheduleWOModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a WO with eligibleLineIds=[LINE-01,LINE-02] and user selects LINE-03 (ineligible), when ack checkbox unchecked, then submit is blocked; when ack checked, then submit allowed and ack_override_reason recorded in audit log
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:214-287, then it has same wide layout, same line/datetime/shift/ack-checkbox/reason fields in same order, and same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Select, Input, Checkbox, Button) — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given a parent WO with planned_end_time=T+3h and selected new_planned_start_time=T+2h (cascade violation), when submit fires, then 422 returned with V-SCHED-03 error and field error displayed

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/RescheduleWOModal.test.tsx covering ack-required-on-ineligible + parity + V-SCHED-03 cascade error
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/RescheduleWOModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow submit on ineligible line without ack
- Do not skip cascade DAG check (V-SCHED-03)
- Do not skip audit log of ack_override_reason

pipeline_inputs.description: Reschedule WO Dialog with line eligibility check, ack-checkbox for ineligible, cascade validation, audit log.
pipeline_inputs.details: Variant of override modal. Loads eligibleLineIds via Server Component join. zod superRefine enforces ack rule. Server Action rescheduleWOAction emits scheduler.wo.rescheduled outbox event.
out_of_scope: Do not implement /reschedule endpoint here (server action delegates to /override + outbox)

Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:214-287, then it has same wide layout, same field order (line/datetime/shift/ack/reason), and same shadcn primitives — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
Given parent WO planned_end_time=T+3h and new_planned_start_time=T+2h, when submit fires, then 422 with V-SCHED-03 error and field error displayed

Do not skip cascade DAG check
Do not skip audit log of ack_override_reason
